_comment: WARNING: DO NOT EDIT. FILE AUTOMATICALLY GENERATED BY PANEL - reviactyl.app
name: Bungeecord
author: authors@reviactyl.app
description: For a long time, Minecraft server owners have had a dream that encompasses a free, easy, and reliable way to connect multiple Minecraft servers together. BungeeCord is the answer to said dream. Whether you are a small server wishing to string multiple game-modes together, or the owner of the ShotBow Network, BungeeCord is the ideal solution for you. With the help of BungeeCord, you will be able to unlock your community's full potential.

installation.script:
#!/bin/ash
# Bungeecord Installation Script
#
# Server Files: /mnt/server

cd /mnt/server

if [ -z "${BUNGEE_VERSION}" ] || [ "${BUNGEE_VERSION}" == "latest" ]; then
    BUNGEE_VERSION="lastStableBuild"
fi

curl -o ${SERVER_JARFILE} https://hub.spigotmc.org/jenkins/job/BungeeCord/${BUNGEE_VERSION}/artifact/bootstrap/target/BungeeCord.jar

variables.name: Bungeecord Version
variables.description: The version of Bungeecord to download and use.

variables.name: Bungeecord Jar File
variables.description: The name of the Jarfile to use when running Bungeecord.

startup_parts.name: UseG1GC
startup_parts.description: Use the G1 Garbage Collector for better performance.

startup_parts.name: ParallelRefProcEnabled
startup_parts.description: Enable parallel reference processing for GC.

startup_parts.name: AlwaysPreTouch
startup_parts.description: Pre-touch memory pages during JVM initialization.

startup_parts.name: G1HeapRegionSize
startup_parts.description: Set G1 heap region size optimized for proxy workloads.

startup_parts.name: MaxInlineLevel
startup_parts.description: Increase max inlining level for better JIT optimization.
